name: Highschool RPG
description:
A school life role-playing game where you get to relive your days back at highschool. There are many things you can do in this game, such as making friends, playing sports, going to the cafeteria, and more. The possibilities are endless!

Do you want to be the class nerd or the most popular student? In this game, you decide your own destiny. Just be careful not to get in too much trouble.

Limitless for possible mature themes.
creator: BHoneyR
